description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in SimpleBoxes/SerendipityNZ Serene Bach 2.05R and earlier, and 2.08D and earlier in the 2.08 series; and (2) sb 1.13D and earlier, and 1.18R and earlier in the 1.18 series; allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via unspecified vectors.
